definitions: 不懈的传播 (在此语境下的释义)

examples.text: One of the great successes of the Republican Party in recent decades is the relentless propagation of a simple formula for economic growth: tax cuts.
examples.explanation: 近年来共和党的一大成功在于不懈地传播一个简单经济增长公式：减税。

reviewSessions.example_text: One of the great successes of the Republican Party in recent decades is the relentless propagation of a simple formula for economic growth: tax cuts.
expected_definitions: 不懈的传播 (在此语境下的释义)
reviewSessions.feedback: 理解基本准确，但缺少“不懈/持续不断”的强调，且未体现语境色彩。
matched_points: 理解了 propagation 表示“传播”
理解了 relentless 表示“持续不停”
missing_points: 未准确体现“不懈地传播”的语气强度
未结合例句语境说明其指对某种经济主张的持续宣传
